2166740.name: Artifact Conquest
2166740.description:
Artifact Conquest is a deep and tactical turn-based strategy game set in a rich fantasy world teetering on the brink of chaos. An ancient artifact has resurfaced. Bestowing its wielder with tactical brilliance, it also corrupts the soul. Now, sinister forces seek to claim its power, and only you can stop them.

Assemble and lead a party of heroes, each of whom you can train and customize to suit your strategy. Explore vast lands, solve intricate puzzles to uncover hidden paths, and engage in strategic battles against monstrous foes. Visit shops and barter with merchants for rare gear, and forge alliances through dialogue with NPCs.

Master Tactical Combat

Engage in strategic battles where every decision matters. Wield a diverse arsenal of weapons, from enchanted swords and powerful bows to devastating magic. Customize your party’s abilities, exploit enemy weaknesses, and adapt your strategy to overcome ruthless foes and formidable bosses.

Leveling & Progression

Recruit allies to aid you on your journey and shape them into powerful warriors. As they grow, unlock new abilities and specialize them into distinct classes: Fighter, Archer, or Wizard, each with unique subclasses. Customize their skills or blend disciplines to create adaptable, hybrid combatants. Discover and equip stronger gear to push your party’s strength even further, preparing them for the challenges ahead.

Lore & Discovery

Unravel the history of the world by speaking with NPCs, uncovering ancient scrolls, and exploring forgotten ruins. Every conversation and relic holds a piece of the past. Stop by shops to trade for weapons, potions, and armor, or hear the latest rumors that may guide your journey.

Key features

  • Engage in deep tactical combat.

  • Unravel a rich world of lore.

  • Face formidable bosses.

  • Level and shape your party.

  • Shop system to upgrade your equipment.
2166740.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 荷兰语
